properties.description: A Canva illustration asset showing 9 cartoon meerkat characters in different poses and expressions: neutral sitting, waving, speaking/sound, thinking, hands raised/happy, pondering with gear icons, pointing, greeting wave, and questioning with speech bubble. The meerkats are rendered in a cute flat-design style with sandy brown coloring and green grass patches. This appears to be a character reference sheet for the Meera AI assistant mascot.
design_decisions: consistent character design across all poses
expressions include: neutral, happy, thinking, questioning, waving, speaking
gear/sparkle icons used to indicate thinking/processing state
question mark speech bubble for confusion state
canva watermark visible on first character
properties.purpose: mascot character asset sheet for Meera AI assistant brand identity
